/AJW/CH1:SP 1Y:M /X: THE DEFENDANT IS SENTENCED TO 1 YEAR SP, THE MID TERM, TO RUN CONSECUTIVE TO THE 12 YEAR SP SENTENCE IN COURTNO 11023225 FOR A TOTAL OF 13 YEARS SP,/DEF:TO RECEIVE CREDIT FOR TIME SERVED 1317  DAYS COUNTY JAIL, 1316  SAGE FOR A TOTAL OF 2633  DAYS,/STATES/DNACOMP/COA:40/ICNA/VF5:300/PAR/CDC/DEF:IS NOT ELIGIBLE FOR SENTENCING PURSUANT TO PC 1170(H)

/CAL:POSSIBLE DISPO/TEXT:DEFT ADV & PERS WVS CONST & CITZ RTS ENT PLEA OFG/DEFT ADV RTS:1/FNDG/CO:PLEA OPEN TO COURT/DEF:ADMITS 2 PRIOR STRIKE CONVICTIONS FOR SENTENCING PURPOSES/STATES/CO:COURT STRUCK BOTH STRIKE CONVICTIONS PURSUANT TO PC1385 AND PEOPLES VS WILLIAMS AND PEOPLES VS ROMERO FOR THE FOLLOWING REASONS:/ /CO:1)THERE WAS NO INJURY OR THREAT OF INJURY, 2)WEAPON USED  WAS A REPLICA HAND GUN INCAPABLE OF FIRING A LIVE AMMUNION ROUND, 3)THERE WAS NO MONETARY LOSS, 4)THE DEFENDANT'S STRIKE PRIOR(664,211)IS 27 YEARS OLD; TOO REMOTE IN TIME, 5)ROLE OF ALCOHOL ABUSE, 6)VOCATIONALTRAINING WHILE IN CUSTODY,7)THE COURT'S INDICATED SENTENCE IS PROPORTIONALTO THIS CRIME/CO:PURSUANT TO PC1385, COURT STRUCK GBI ALLEGATION AS TO COUNT 1 AS THE COURT FOUND THAT THE INJURY SUSTAINED BY THE ALLEGED VICTIM DIDNOT AMOUNT TOGREAT BODILY INJURY, THE COURT RULED AFTER REVIEW OF ALLEGEDVICTIM'S MEDICAL RECORDS INDICATING NORMAL VITAL FUNCTIONS, NO PAIN ASSOCIATED WITHIN THENECK, CHEST, ABDOMIN OR HEAD(OTHER THAN HEADACHE); LOSS OF CONSCIENCE OF 20-30 SECONDS; CT SCAN OF HEAD NORMAL, EYES, CHEST, CARDIO-VASCULAR ALL WITHIN NORMAL RANGE/ /PRES:02-24-17/CONTD:SENTENCING/TWS/DOP/
